title: Gene Keys Hexagram
description: Structural data for one of the 64 Gene Keys hexagrams. Frequency text descriptions are not included; this schema describes the substrate only.

frequencies.description: The three frequencies of any Gene Key. Always shadow, gift, siddhi.

name.description: The canonical Gene Keys hexagram name from Rudd's published material. Stays null in this repo without Gene Keys Publishing's explicit blessing; see CONTRIBUTING.md.

i_ching_name_pinyin.description: Toned pinyin romanization of the King Wen hexagram name (e.g., 'Qián', 'Kūn'). Public domain. Factual transliteration of ancient Chinese.

codon.description: The three-letter DNA codon mapped to this hexagram in the Gene Keys system. Null until contributed.

amino_acid.description: The amino acid corresponding to the codon for this hexagram. Null until contributed.

i_ching_number.description: Cross-reference to the King Wen I Ching hexagram number. Null until contributed.

human_design_gate.description: Cross-reference to the Human Design gate number. Null until contributed.

programming_partner_id.description: The hexagram id of this Gene Key's programming partner. Pairs are symmetric. Null until contributed.

codon_ring_id.description: The codon ring (1 to 22) this hexagram belongs to. Null until contributed.
